channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jazz lose to Lakers, fall to 3-11 this season
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - While the Lakers' two all-stars LeBron James and Anthony Davis had their way with the Utah Jazz Tuesday night, it was L.A.'s rookie that did the most damage.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU and Arizona State both have exceeded expectations
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU is still in the College Football Playoffs as of now, but they desperately need a win over #21 Arizona State in Tempe this Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: White Sox call up Colson Montgomery, Juan Carela from minor leagues
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have selected the contracts of shortstop Colson Montgomery and right-handed pitcher Juan Carela, both of whom are highly rated in the organization, to their 40-man roster.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Utes hope to end six-game slide against Iowa State
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah football team will try to end its longest losing streak in 22 years when they take on #22 Iowa State Saturday in their home finale at Rice-Eccles Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Trump attends UFC championship fight in New York, taking break from Cabinet picks
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump walked out to a roaring standing ovation just ahead of the start of the UFC pay-per-view card at Madison Square Garden on Saturday night, combining two things close to his heart: fierce battles inside the octagon and New York City.
item.dc:creator: Will Weissert, WFLA, NBC

item.title: BYU suffers first loss of season to Kansas, 17-13
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU still has a great shot at the Big 12 Championship Game, but the Cougars undefeated season came to an end Saturday night against Kansas. Jalon Daniels threw for 169 yards, Dylan Neal ran for two touchdowns and Kansas upset No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah State crushes Hawaii, 55-10
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Rahsul Faison rushed for 192 yards and two touchdowns, as the Utah State football team cruised past Hawaii Saturday at Maverik Stadium, 55-10.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Draymond Green's foul against Zach Edey is upgraded by the NBA to a flagrant 1
item.description: Golden State forward Draymond Green's foul against Memphis' Zach Edey in the third quarter of the Warriors' victory over the Grizzlies has been upgraded to a category-one flagrant, the NBA said Saturday after reviewing the play.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bulls look to break Rockets' 4-game win streak Sunday
item.description: Houston Rockets (9-4, third in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (5-8, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 7 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Houston is looking to prolong its four-game win streak with a victory against Chicago. The Bulls are 1-4 in home games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Roy High to play for first state title since 1981
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Roy High football team will play for its first state championship in 43 years. Roy defeated defending 5A champion Timpview on Friday, 29-19 to advance to next week's title game at Rice-Eccles Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
